valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Tue 23 Jun 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Wed 24 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: High German Bight 1025 dissipating. New high expected Shannon 1020 by 0600 tomorrow

FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In southeast, variable 2 to 4, becoming easterly 4 or 5 for a time in east. In northwest, northerly or northeasterly 4 or 5, occasionally 6 at first.
Sea state
In southeast, slight in east, slight or moderate in west. in northwest, slight or moderate.
Weather
In southeast, thundery showers, fog patches. In northwest, fog patches, showers later, perhaps thundery.
Visibility
In southeast, moderate or good, occasionally very poor. In northwest, moderate or good, occasionally very poor.
